parameters.text:
Analyze this South African payslip document and extract ALL employment and salary information. Return ONLY valid JSON with no markdown formatting or code blocks.

IDENTITY & EMPLOYMENT:
- employer_name: Company/employer name
- employer_tax_ref: Employer PAYE reference number
- employee_number: Employee/payroll number
- tax_number: Employee tax reference number
- id_number: SA ID number (13 digits)
- irp5_reference: IRP5 certificate number
- pay_period: Pay date or period (e.g. "February 2026" or "28/02/2026")
- designation: Job title / position / designation
- cost_centre: Cost centre name or code
- hourly_rate: Hourly rate of pay (number only)
- normal_hours: Normal hours worked this period (number only)
- leave_days: Leave days balance or accrued (number only)

EARNINGS:
- gross_salary: Gross monthly pay (number only, no currency symbols)
- net_salary: Net/take-home pay (number only)
- bonus: 13th cheque or bonus amount (number only)
- commission: Commission income (number only)
- overtime: Overtime pay (number only)
- travel_allowance: Travel allowance amount (number only)
- other_earnings: Array of additional earnings [{"name":"...","amount":number}] or null

EMPLOYEE DEDUCTIONS:
- paye: PAYE tax deducted (number only)
- uif: UIF contribution (number only)
- medical_aid: Medical aid deduction (number only)
- medical_aid_members: Number of medical aid dependants (integer)
- pension_fund: Pension/provident fund employee contribution (number only)
- retirement_annuity: Retirement annuity contribution (number only)
- sdl: Skills Development Levy / Prescribed Levy (number only)
- wellness_fund: Wellness fund / EAP deduction (number only)
- union_fees: Union / association fees (number only)
- other_deductions: Array of additional deductions [{"name":"...","amount":number}] or null
- total_deductions: Total of all deductions (number only)

COMPANY CONTRIBUTIONS (not deducted from salary):
- employer_pension: Employer pension contribution / pension fringe benefit (number only)
- employer_uif: Employer UIF contribution (number only)
- employer_oid: OID / COIDA / Workmen's Compensation (number only)

YEAR-TO-DATE TOTALS:
- ytd_gross: YTD gross remuneration (number only)
- ytd_paye: YTD PAYE tax (number only)
- ytd_pension: YTD pension fund contributions (number only)
- ytd_medical_aid: YTD medical aid contributions (number only)

OTHER:
- notes: Any additional relevant info
- confidence: 0-100

If a field is not found or unclear, use null.
For monetary amounts, use numbers only (no R, no spaces).
For other_earnings and other_deductions, return array of {name, amount} objects or null.
